race.comment: The $75,000 Capricorn Guineas. ENFORCEABLE (2) is a model of consistency only missing a drum once in ten career outings and that was a close-up fourth at Doomben on debut. Will be high on confidence following that last-start Gold Coast victory and looks the one they all have to run down. The penny has dropped for EXODAS (10) who has strung three wins together on the bounce and winning rider Sewell reunites. Looms as the main danger. ILLEGAL JUSTICE (4) strips fitter second-up from the spell and looks to have plenty of upside. Top-three credentials. SCIALLA (11) is yet to miss a quinella spot in five career outings to date and only needs some luck from the sticky draw to be playing a major role in the finish. ALIQUAM (3) best of the rest in a cracking contest.
